extension.description: Orion v3.2.2 - Complete media addon with multiple torrent scrapers (Torrentio, MediaFusion, Jackettio, Orionoid), Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox, Trakt integration with scrobbling, watchlists and liked lists, ResolveURL support, watch history, favorites, Kids Zone, and auto-play next episode.
extension.news: [3.2.2] Fixed Real-Debrid resolving .rar files instead of videos - now selects only video files and skips archives. Added clear error dialog when no debrid service is configured. Added ResolveURL debrid fallback for magnets.
